case_title: LUI, GREGORY et al vs. HENG, VENG et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUI, GREGORY LUI, CHUNG AS TO DEFENDANT HENG, VENG CHIANG, ANDREA SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-19-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-22-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-29-1993
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ANDREA CHIANG FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUI, GREGORY LUI, CHUNG SERVED JAN-29-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHIANG, ANDREA
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HENG, VENG CHIANG, ANDREA
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUI, GREGORY LUI, CHUNG
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HENG, VENG CHIANG, ANDREA
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-19-1993, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON AUG-31-1993 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(D) NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, CAIN, DAVID (130516), ARB-5 MAILED
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, CAIN, DAVID (130516), ARB-5 MAILED
ADDED TO STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-10-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
CASE WILL BE GOING TO BINDING OUTSIDE ARBITRATION; LETTER FORTHCOMING AND ARB TO BE NOTIFIED.
CORRESPONDENCE CONFIRMING CASE BEING HEARD BY OUTSIDE ARB; ARB ALSO NOTIFIED.

LAST TWO ENTRIES WHEREBY CASE WANTS TO GO TO OUTSIDE ARB. HAVE BEEN STRICKEN. ATTYS NOW WANT TO BE REINSTATED TO JUDICIAL ARB; AND WILL HAVE CASE HEARD BY DAVID CAIN BEFORE FOR ORIGINAL 12/1/93 ASSIGNMENT PERIOD IS UP. LETTER COMING
CORRESPONDENCE REC'D FROM PLTF THAT CASE IS AGAIN BEING HEARD BY ASSIGNED ARB. DAVID CAIN AS THE JAMS ARBITRATION FELL THROUGH. STILL WITHIN THE ASSIGNED ARB'S PERIOD.
CORRES REC'D THAT CASE IS NOW TO BE HEARD ON 12/8/93 BY AN ALTERNATIVE DISPUTE RESOLUTION SERVICE.
CONTINUATION OF STATUS CONFERENCE STATUS CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO FEB-10-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
CASE REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION GOING TO ALTERNATIVE DISPUTE RESOLUTION SERVICE.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
